subcodes.first_line: O Ruhu'llah! The Most Great Spirit hath turned unto thee from the precincts of the Prison, and maketh mention of thee with that which fadeth not in its fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا روح الله قد اقبل الیک الروح الاعظم من شطر السجن و یذکرک بما لاینفد عرفه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @The Holy Spirit, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
